name: Ithoria: Nexus
description: Step into the mystical world of Ithoria, where ancient technology and magic collide! Guided by the enigmatic Elyndria Nexus, embark on an epic journey across breathtaking landscapes, uncover hidden secrets, and battle legendary foes. Your choices shape the future of this vast world—are you ready to discover your true destiny? Ithoria awaits!
creator: Lianwashere
